name: Ground Chuck Picadillo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick skillet over high heat, cook the ground chuck until it begins to brown and break into pieces.
2. Remove the cooked meat using a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Reduce the heat to medium. Add the onions and garlic to the same skillet and cook until they become soft.
4. Stir in lime juice, tomato sauce, green olives, raisins, ground cumin, and cinnamon.
5. Allow the mixture to simmer for 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
6. Serve hot, portioned for 4 people.
